items.title: How to Think About Trump’s War With Iran
items.description: Ending the Islamic Republic’s regime will be long and arduous, but perhaps a softer version will emerge.

items.description: We have the latest news from multiple fronts in the Middle East.

items.title: As Trump Bombs Iran, America’s Allies Watch Fitfully From Sidelines
items.description: Disregarded by President Trump over Iran, Europe’s leaders are adapting to a world in which they are little more than bystanders.

items.title: Trump Says More U.S. Casualties Are ‘Likely’ in War With Iran, and Oil Prices Jump After Attack
items.description: Plus, what to know about the A.I. videos that kids are watching.

items.title: New York City Paid $117 Million to Settle Misconduct Lawsuits in 2025
